title: malach #4414
definition:
1) to tear away, dissipate
    1a) (Niphal) to be dispersed, be dissipated
 2) to salt, season
    2a) (Qal) to salt, season
    2b) (Pual) to be salted
    2c) (Hophal) to be rubbed or washed with salt
